Bluebot ProLink Prime

Bluebot ProLink Prime helps teams monitor larger water lines without relying on Wi-Fi at the meter location.

It is designed for remote sites, commercial properties, irrigation, and larger 2.5 inch, 3 inch, and 4 inch pipe applications.

The clamp-on meter mounts outside the pipe, keeps the water path untouched, and provides dashboard visibility for usage and alerts.

Pricing starts at $999 with monthly package and data plan options.

Shop
